title: You are a Code Reviewer. Evaluate integration quality of the video generation pipeline. ## PIPELINE FILES 1. scripts/generate-video.ts (214 lines) — Main pipeline orchestrator 2. src/services/planner/orchestrator.ts (327 lines) — LLM-based scenario/dialogue/direction 3. src/services/compose/compose....
summary_text: { "scores": { "accuracy": 1, "performance": 1, "maintainability": 0 }, "total": 2, "issues": [ { "severity": "critical", "file": "scripts/generate-video.ts:13-18,61-171", "description": "Main pipeline never imports/calls ImageOrchestrator, so no scene images are generated or attached. Remotion always falls back to gradients even when Direction includes image intent.", "suggestion": "Add an explicit image phase (after compose, before render): generate images, copy to public assets, and write per-scene imageFile paths into updatedScript." }, { "severity": "critical", "file": "src/services/compose/compose.ts:202-207,247-251", "description": "compose() discards Direction image data entirely. SceneBase supports imagePrompt/imageFile, and DirectionScene has image, but buildScene() never maps direction.scenes[i].image to output.", "suggestion": "Map directionScene?.image into scene.imagePrompt during compose, then let image generation phase resolve imageFile from that prompt." }, { "severity": "critical", "file": "src/services/tts/client.ts:136-146", "description": "COEIROINKClient.synthesize() ignores request.speaker and always uses constructor defaults (speakerUuid/styleId). CLI --speaker is effectively broken when COEIROINK is selected.", "suggestion": "Introduce speaker-id -> {speakerUuid, styleId} resolution per request, or reject unsupported speaker values explicitly." }, { "severity": "major", "file": "src/services/planner/orchestrator.ts:166-210", "description": "Fallback dialogue templates inject raw topic text into Japanese sentences. English terms (e.g., TypeScript/OAuth) are not normalized for Japanese TTS readability.", "suggestion": "Add text normalization/transliteration for ASCII tokens before fallback dialogue generation (katakana conversion or pronunciation dictionary)." }, { "severity": "major", "file": "src/services/tts/client.ts:87-99", "description": "estimateMoraTimings() forces every mora vowel to \"a\", producing flat mouth motion when VOICEVOX timings are unavailable (COEIROINK path).", "suggestion": "Implement kana/romaji-based vowel inference so lip-sync has a/e/i/o/u variation; keep even timing if needed but vary vowel classes." }, { "severity": "major", "file": "src/services/image/orchestrator.ts:346-373", "description": "generateImages() returns a sparse string[] with no scene index/sceneId binding. If some scenes lack direction.image, returned order no longer maps reliably to script scenes.", "suggestion": "Return a keyed structure (Map<sceneIndex|string, imagePath>) or fixed-length array aligned to direction.scenes indices." }, { "severity": "minor", "file": "src/services/compose/compose.ts:243-251", "description": "No contract check for dialogue.scenes.length vs direction.scenes.length. Direction overflow/underflow is silently ignored, hiding planner-output inconsistencies.", "suggestion": "Validate equal scene counts (or define deterministic padding/truncation behavior) and fail fast on mismatch." } ], "summary": "Integration quality is low: visual-direction and image generation are not connected to the production pipeline, speaker selection is broken on COEIROINK, and fallback TTS behavior degrades pronunciation/lip-sync quality. The pipeline currently succeeds at script+audio rendering, but key planner outputs (direction.image and speaker intent) are not faithfully propagated end-to-end." }
